questionHtml:
Daniela wins a prize. She is offered two options for receiving her winnings over a period of three years.

Option A: Daniela receives $4200 at the end of each month.

Option B: Daniela receives $1500 at the end of the first month. Each month after this, the amount she receives increases by 4%.

Option B.
markschemeHtml:
Note: The first time an answer is not given to two decimal places in parts (a)(ii), (c)(i) or (d), the final A1 in that part is not awarded.

recognizing sum of a geometric sequence is required                    (M1)

15001-1.04361-1.04                    (A1)

=116397.4707…

=$116397.47                    A1

[3 marks]
